top_signals.title: Oil Rebounds as US Hits Hormuz Targets With Talks at an Impasse
top_signals.summary: Oil advanced, following a drop of more than 5% on Wednesday, as US forces made fresh strikes in the Islamic Republic, while Washington and Tehran remained at odds over how to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Iran war squeezes acid, aluminum, miners’ margins: WoodMac
top_signals.summary: The clash has disrupted more than half the seaborne sulphur trade, shut in about 11 million bbl/d of crude and put 3-3.5Mt of aluminum output at risk.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Analysis: China AI ignores Takaichi's condolences over coal mine blast

top_signals.title: Guidance: OFSI General licence INT/2024/4761108

top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: World’s appetite for AI makes China less afraid of stronger yuan
top_signals.summary: Even as the yuan climbed to its strongest level since 2023 and the economy looked more fragile, policymakers have shown little urgency to step in.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
